<div class="section-outer section-green">
 <div class="section-header">
  <span class="section-header-text">In this section, we will discuss how to use and design skills for agentic engineering.</span>
 </div>
 <div class="section-grid section-grid-3">
  <div class="section-card">
   <div class="section-card-icon"><i data-lucide="library"></i></div>
   <div class="section-label">Common Skills</div>
  </div>
  <div class="section-card">
   <div class="section-card-icon"><i data-lucide="pencil-ruler"></i></div>
   <div class="section-label">Skill Design</div>
  </div>
  <div class="section-card">
   <div class="section-card-icon"><i data-lucide="link"></i></div>
   <div class="section-label">Skill Symlinks</div>
  </div>
 </div>
</div>
